no: Short dialogue additions for vanilla NPCs. Extends Imoen's ToB script (imoe25.bcs) and adds a new dialogue file (BFS_ImoenWraith.d). Uses CamDawg's CD_STATE_NOTVALID state.ids code. BG2EE/EET, ToB-only. English only, v1.0.
sum: Short dialogue additions for vanilla NPCs, extending Imoen’s ToB interactions.
